output: All four checks pass. Added `_DEPS_RE = re.compile(r"^(\s*)@deps\s+(.+)$")` at `bob_tools/planfile/parser.py:35`, alongside the other line-level recognizer regexes. Per the design doc grammar (`DepsLine ← Indent* "@deps" (WS TaskRef)+ NL`), the second group captures the tail of bare task IDs; splitting and validating each `T-NNNNNN` is a higher-level concern. As a bare constant, no test is warranted.
